review_notes: The functions generally map well to the control AC-17(1) by focusing on network policies and secure configurations that can help monitor and control remote access in Kubernetes. However, the reasoning could be expanded to better explain the relevance of each function to remote access monitoring and control.
naming_improvements: Consider adding more context to 'k8s_service_type_loadbalancer_restricted' to specify what restrictions are in place, e.g., 'k8s_service_type_loadbalancer_internal_only'.
title: Remote Access - Remote access | monitoring and control employ automated mechanisms to monitor an
step1_reasoning: The control AC-17(1) focuses on monitoring and controlling remote access, which in the context of Kubernetes can be mapped to ensuring that network policies are in place to restrict ingress and egress traffic, thereby preventing unauthorized access. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer services and ensuring TLS is enabled for ingress controllers helps to secure remote access points.
